content.summary:
**3 parallel agents implemented all 7 remaining Agent-AI UX gaps.** Full workspace build clean (cargo check passes), all 28 tests pass.

**Gap 1 — CallFlow step kind:** Added `CallFlow { flow_path, input }` variant to `FlowStepKind` (core/flow.rs) and `ExecStepKind` (engine/flow.rs). `flatten_steps()` maps it through. `execute()` looks up flow definition via `backend.get_flow()`, deserializes, flattens, recursively executes (`execute_step_inner`), merges results into parent context. Supports hierarchical flow composition.

**Gap 2 — Shell-based Branch/ForLoop/WhileLoop:** When BranchOne/BranchAll/ForLoop/WhileLoop body steps have no compiled WASM binary, falls back to executing body steps that are Shell kind via tokio::process::Command. BranchOne picks first successful branch, BranchAll runs all, ForLoop iterates with shell body, WhileLoop evaluates condition (snapshot-based). All use same timeout/retry/failure_step as regular Shell steps.

**Gap 3 — on_failure dead code fix:** `execute()` now has a companion `execute_with_handlers()` accepting `failure_handler: Option<&str>`. When a top-level step fails (no per-step failure_step), creates a synthetic FailureModule ExecStep and executes it. Existing 4-param `execute()` preserved as wrapper for backward compatibility.

**Gap 4 — graph→execution feedback:** `flow_execute` MCP handler (lib.rs) creates `NodeKind::Run` nodes in graph after successful flow/DAG execution, with properties: flow_path, execution_time, status, result count. Nodes are queryable via graph_query.

**Gap 5 — Property-based graph queries:** `GraphStore` has `find_nodes_by_properties()` and `find_nodes_by_properties_paginated()`. `GraphQueryParams` has new `properties: Option<HashMap<String, Value>>` field. Handler supports: properties-only (uses GraphStore methods), kind+properties (in-memory kind-filter then properties-filter), kind-only (existing paginated SQL).

**Gap 6 — Parallelism:** `execute()` restructured: each round separates pending steps into ready (deps met) vs not-ready. Ready steps for Script/Shell/Sleep are executed via `futures::future::join_all`. Complex steps (Branch, Loop, CallFlow, FailureModule) use snapshot-based `execute_step_inner` and run via join_all too. Results merged sequentially after all complete.

**Gap 7 — Shell timeout orphan kill:** `.kill_on_drop(true)` added to all tokio::process::Command invocations. On timeout, the child handle is dropped which kills the spawned sh -c process.

**Additional work by agents (beyond 7 gaps):** Extends to 33 files (+5448 lines). New/improved: REST API server (automaton-api), CLI commands (automaton-cli), Postgres backend (automaton-postgres), registry with flow/resource/trigger/job/schedule/variable CRUD (automaton-registry), worker daemon, scheduler, SDK derive macro improvements, secrets management, runtime improvements, MCP handlers with many new tools, comprehensive test suite. Test count: automaton-engine 12 + automaton-graph 7 + automaton-registry 14 + automaton-runtime 2 + automaton-scheduler 3 + automaton-build 5 + automaton-tests 28 = 71+ tests total across workspace.

todos.content: Group 1: flow.rs — CallFlow + on_failure + Shell Branch/Loop + Parallelism + orphan kill
Group 2: graph.rs + tools.rs — Property-based graph queries
Group 3: lib.rs — graph→execution feedback (Run nodes) + wire properties filter
Build and run full test suite

Delivered prioritized roadmap: P0 Streaming execution, P1 Property indexes+text search+deny_unknown_fields, P2 Postgres migration+rate limiting+webhooks, P3 Plugin system+telemetry+visualization+time-range queries.
